name: Kemps School Bus Svc
recent_news: No public web presence found tying a 'Kemps School Bus Service' to Mount Holly, NC / 301 Riverfront Pkwy. The Kemp's Bus surname results all map to Kemp's Bus Sales/Service in Livonia/Avon, NY (John Kemp owner) — different company. Gaston County NC operates its own district fleet, so a small private operator here is plausible but unverified.
fit_notes: Cannot confirm this is an active independent school-bus operator. Listed employee count (36) and Mount Holly address would suggest a sub-scale single-yard operator, but identity and even existence need direct verification (phone/state SOS) before pursuing as a tuck-in.

name: Herrera School Buses & Coaches
districts_or_customers: Albuquerque Public Schools (APS) — contract NOT renewed June 2024
recent_news: Aug 2024: APS sued Herrera demanding return of 62 school buses or ~$1.6M in payments after declining to renew the 2023–2024 contract; APS had to absorb routes with its 281 district-owned buses. Major operational disruption — Herrera lost its anchor customer.
fit_notes: 3rd-generation family operator since 1930 with school+motorcoach platform in NM, but loss of APS anchor + active litigation makes this a distressed/risky tuck-in rather than a clean acquisition. Could be opportunity if fleet/yard can be acquired at discount, but legal overhang and customer-concentration loss are red flags.

name: Buswest
owner_or_parent: Velocity Vehicle Group (parent of LA Freightliner; Daimler dealer network)
districts_or_customers: sells Thomas Built buses to school districts across CA, NV, AZ, HI
recent_news: Buswest is a Thomas Built Buses dealership (school bus sales, parts, service), a division of Velocity Vehicle Group / LA Freightliner. Acquired Auto Safety House and California Bus Sales in prior expansions. Operates dealer locations in Carson, Sacramento/Woodland, San Diego, Tucson, Flagstaff, Las Vegas.
fit_notes: NOT A TUCK-IN TARGET. Buswest is a school bus DEALER (Thomas Built / Daimler distributor), not a contract transportation operator. Owned by Velocity Vehicle Group — a strategic. Exclude from buyer-side outreach.

name: Fleming Transportation Corp
districts_or_customers: Baltimore-area public and private school systems
recent_news: Operating ~30+ years. Maryland MBE-certified, certified ACDBE/MB/SBE Special Needs Passenger Transportation provider; credentialed with PSC, MVA, MDOT, USDOT. Small steady operator, no M&A news.
fit_notes: Founder-led (Earl Fleming) family operator at ~30+ years of age — strong succession signal. MBE/ACDBE/SBE certifications + special-needs focus give it a differentiated niche valuable for Summit's Mid-Atlantic platform. Sub-scale (~27 EE, ~$1.3M rev) and likely a small fleet, but a clean independent tuck-in candidate in Summit's footprint.

name: STS Motorcoaches
owner_or_parent: likely Texas Rural Student Transportation, LLC (TxRST) — see notes
recent_news: The 2304 Crockett Dr, Brownwood TX address is the Brownwood ISD transportation yard and is also listed by Texas Rural Student Transportation, LLC (txrst.com, HQ Corpus Christi) as their Brownwood office contracting with Brownwood ISD and Early ISD. 'Stsbus.com' is parked/for sale, suggesting STS Motorcoaches is either dormant or an old DBA of the TxRST operation. No standalone STS Motorcoaches operating entity verified.
website: stsbus.com (domain for sale; likely defunct). Possible parent: https://www.txrst.com/
fit_notes: Likely NOT an independent tuck-in target at this name. The Brownwood yard appears operated by Texas Rural Student Transportation, LLC (Corpus Christi HQ, Graham family) — TxRST itself could be the real target for a TX rural-route platform play. STS Motorcoaches as a standalone is unverifiable and likely defunct/absorbed.
